What shadow soldier was once the Ant King?

What is Sung Jin-Woo's mother's name?
What is Jin-Woo's father's name?

What two cosmic factions are fighting?
What item lets time be turned back near the end?

What does Jin-Woo create from fallen enemies?
What mysterious interface appears only to Jin-Woo?
What is the name of Jin-Woo's knight-like shadow soldier?
Who is Sung Jin-Woo?
200.a: The weakest E-rank hunter who is reborn as the world's only player — able to level up endlessly

200.q: What is a Hunter in Solo Leveling?
200.a: A person who can enter magical dungeons called Gates to fight monsters

200.q: What are Gates?
200.a: Dimensional rifts that appear worldwide — hunters must clear them or monsters escape and destroy cities

200.q: What is the Double Dungeon?
200.a: The dangerous hidden dungeon where Jin-Woo dies and is reborn as a Player

200.q: Who is Cha Hae-In?
200.a: The top S-rank hunter of Korea who later becomes Jin-Woo's love interest

200.q: What rank is Jin-Woo at the start?
200.a: E-rank — the absolute weakest level of hunter

200.q: What system does Jin-Woo receive?
200.a: The System — a game-like interface that gives him quests and lets him level up his stats

200.q: What are Shadow Soldiers?
200.a: Jin-Woo's army of reanimated monster and human corpses under his command

200.q: Who is Igris?
200.a: Jin-Woo's first and most loyal shadow soldier — a powerful knight

200.q: What is the webtoon based on?
200.a: A Korean web novel by Chugong — adapted into a webtoon, then an anime

400.q: What island raid nearly collapses South Korea before Jin-Woo intervenes?
Who is the chairman of the Korean Hunters Association?
What is Jin-Woo's father's name?
What rank hunter is Cha Hae-In?
What guild master can transform into a white tiger beast form?
What Korean S-rank healer dies during the Jeju Island operation?
What title is Jin-Woo mocked with before becoming powerful?
What class path does Jin-Woo first receive from the System?
What is the name of Korea's strongest female hunter who notices Jin-Woo?
What title does Jin-Woo inherit from Ashborn?
What island raid changes Korea's hunter world?
What is Sung Jin-Woo's job at the start?
What color rank is Jin-Woo first classified as?
What is Jin-Woo's mother's condition called in the series?
What hidden stat lets Jin-Woo keep leveling?
What red knight becomes one of his first elite shadows?
What profession are dungeon fighters called?
What daily quest keeps rewarding Jin-Woo?
What title traps Jin-Woo in a deadly tutorial?
What hidden stat allows Jin-Woo to keep growing?
Who is the Monarch of Shadows?
400.a: The true form Jin-Woo inherits — one of the most powerful beings in existence

400.q: What is the Rulers vs Monarchs war?
400.a: An ancient cosmic conflict between Rulers (angels of light) and Monarchs (kings of darkness)

400.q: Who is the Ant King?
400.a: The most powerful monster Jin-Woo defeats — he almost kills Jin-Woo but is ultimately defeated and revived as a shadow

400.q: What is the Jeju Island raid?
400.a: A national crisis where Korea's top hunters fail to clear a high-level dungeon — Jin-Woo saves the mission

400.q: Who is Sung Il-Hwan?
400.a: Jin-Woo's father — a missing hunter who was actually fighting on another world against monsters

400.q: What is a Double Dungeon?
400.a: A trap dungeon hidden inside a regular dungeon — extremely rare and deadly

400.q: What is the Player system's final purpose?
400.a: The Absolute Being created it to forge a weapon powerful enough to defeat the Monarchs

400.q: Who is Beru?
400.a: The Ant King shadow soldier — becomes one of Jin-Woo's most powerful generals, speaks in old Korean

400.q: What is the S-rank gate that changed Korea?
400.a: The Jeju Island A-rank gate that upgraded — the ants from it nearly destroyed Korea

400.q: Who is Go Gun-Hee?
400.a: The chairman of the Korean Hunter Association — he recognises Jin-Woo's potential early on

600.q: What monarch's power does Jin-Woo inherit?
Who was the previous Shadow Monarch before Jin-Woo?
What cosmic factions are at war above humanity?
Who created the System to train Jin-Woo?
What is the true name of the Shadow Monarch before Jin-Woo inherits it?
What country is National Level Hunter Thomas Andre from?
What is Jin-Woo's sister's name?
Which ant king later serves Jin-Woo?
What monarch attacks using ice powers?
What monarch opposes Jin-Woo with icy power?
What class upgrade does Jin-Woo receive after a job change?
What beastly enemy monarch opposes Jin-Woo?
What giant stone statue nearly kills Jin-Woo first?
What castle dungeon arc powers Jin-Woo up?
What demon noble becomes Jin-Woo's ally there?
What Korean guild master leads the Hunters Guild?
What war between rulers and monarchs drives the story?
What kingly predecessor chose Jin-Woo as successor?
What was Tusk's original name before becoming a shadow?
What true title does Jin-Woo inherit from Ashborn?
What is the island raid that changes everything?
Who is the architect that designed the System?
What is the name of Jin-Woo's first elite shadow knight?
What is the name of the Rulers' sworn enemies?
Which hunter guild does Baek Yoon-ho lead?
What is the Absolute Being?
600.a: The creator of the System — a god-like entity who manipulated both Rulers and Monarchs

600.q: What is the true nature of Jin-Woo's power?
600.a: He is the vessel chosen to inherit the Shadow Monarch's power — Ashborn's successor

600.q: What is the significance of Jin-Woo resetting time?
600.a: After winning the final battle, Jin-Woo uses a stone to travel back 10 years — to prevent all suffering

600.q: What is Ashborn?
600.a: The Shadow Monarch — a Ruler who defected and became a Monarch, creating the shadow army system

600.q: What is the cosmic significance of the Player System?
600.a: The Absolute Being created Jin-Woo specifically as a weapon to end the Ruler-Monarch war permanently

600.q: What are S-rank hunters?
600.a: The top tier of hunters — there are only a handful per country. Jin-Woo eventually surpasses all of them

600.q: What is the significance of Sung Jin-Woo's title National Level Hunter?
600.a: He is classified beyond national — as a threat or asset equivalent to a nation-state's military

600.q: What is the International Guild Conference?
600.a: A gathering showing that Jin-Woo's power is now a global political issue — every major nation wants him

600.q: Who is Thomas Andre?
600.a: The strongest American hunter — a National Level hunter who fights Jin-Woo and loses conclusively

600.q: What is the final enemy in Solo Leveling?
600.a: The Monarchs collectively invade Earth — Jin-Woo fights all of them
